title: point_list
css: .points-wrap{width:100vw;height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:14px;padding:28px 40px;font-family:"Space Grotesk","Segoe UI",sans-serif;color:#fff;background:transparent;}.points-list{margin:0;padding-left:28px;display:grid;gap:22px;list-style-position:outside;}.point-item{font-size:32px;line-height:1.2;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,.55);visibility:hidden;}.point-item strong,.point-item span{display:block;opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);}.point-item strong{font-size:34px;}.point-item span{font-size:24px;}.point-item.point-shown{visibility:visible;}.point-item.point-shown strong{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}.point-item.point-shown span{opacity:.95;transform:translateY(0);}.point-item.point-enter{visibility:visible;}.point-item.point-enter strong{animation:pointTitleIn .42s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) forwards;}.point-item.point-enter span{animation:pointContentIn .5s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) .12s forwards;}.point-item.point-exit{visibility:visible;}.point-item.point-exit strong{animation:pointTitleOut .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) var(--exit-delay,0ms) forwards;}.point-item.point-exit span{animation:pointContentOut .34s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) calc(var(--exit-delay,0ms) + 40ms) forwards;}@keyframes pointTitleIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}@keyframes pointContentIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px);}to{opacity:.95;transform:translateY(0);}}@keyframes pointTitleOut{from{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}to{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px);}}@keyframes pointContentOut{from{opacity:.95;transform:translateY(0);}to{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px);}}
